title: Windows LSASS Memory Access
description: Detects tools accessing LSASS process memory for credential dumping. LSASS stores authentication credentials and is a primary target for credential theft.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Process Name' like '*rundll32.exe' and 'Command Line' like '*MiniDump*') or ('Process Name' like '*taskmgr.exe' and 'Command Line' like '*lsass*'))
falsepositives: Memory dump for Microsoft support cases
